creator: raviraj_basis@hotmail.com
text:
Hi

Firefox version upgrade to 118.x. Still same issue & error when running firefox from terminal.

Also,

================================================================================

root@localhost:~ # pkg info firefox | grep -A 5 Annotations
Annotations    :
	FreeBSD_version: 1302001
	cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:mozilla:firefox:118.0:::::freebsd13:x64
	no_provide_shlib: yes
	repo_type      : binary
	repository     : FreeBSD
================================================================================

Thanks
rraj
